questions.text: Is all data securely handled (encrypted, classified, and protected from public access)?
Are strong access controls enforced (MFA, no root misuse, least privilege, and SSO)?
Is access governance mature (JIT access, periodic reviews, and conditional policies)?
Is the network securely designed (private resources, restricted access, and DDoS/WAF protection)?
Is advanced network security in place (firewalling, monitoring, and zero trust principles)?
Are applications secure throughout the lifecycle (VAPT, OWASP fixes, secure CI/CD)?
Is advanced application security implemented (SAST, dependency scanning, runtime protection)?
Are compliance and regulatory requirements continuously met and auditable?
Are backup and disaster recovery capabilities defined, automated, and regularly tested?
Are logging, monitoring, and threat detection centrally managed with alerting and SIEM integration?
Is the shared responsibility model clearly understood and documented?
Are APIs and secrets securely managed (authentication, rate limiting, secure storage, rotation)?
Is third-party/vendor risk actively assessed and monitored?
Is there a well-defined and tested incident response capability (including automation and playbooks)?
Are endpoints and workloads protected (EDR and system hardening)?
Is DevSecOps implemented with security embedded and enforced in the pipeline?
